problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: Combining Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
